# Audio samples

Drop your generated WAV files here with these exact names (referenced by ../index.html):

Pure Egyptian Arabic:
  eg1_voicetut.wav     eg1_base.wav      (Mohamed)
  eg2_voicetut.wav     eg2_base.wav      (Yasmin)

Code-switching:
  cs1_voicetut.wav     cs1_base.wav      (Asmaa)
  cs2_voicetut.wav     cs2_base.wav      (Sayed)

Voice cloning:
  clone1_voicetut.wav  clone1_reference.wav

*_voicetut.wav = generated by VoiceTut-TTS (checkpoint-20000)
*_base.wav     = generated by base k2-fsa/OmniVoice with the same text/speaker ref
